title: Zolai Training Bundle
subtitle: Full training data for Zolai language model (2.2M entries)
description:
Complete Zolai (Tedim) language training dataset. Format: {"text": "sentence"}

- zolai_train_full.jsonl: 2,247,330 entries (444MB)
- zolai_val.jsonl: 5,000 entries

Sources: Bible translations (TB77, Judson, Tedim1932, Luther), Kaggle LCEA, zolai-toolkit corpus. Use with Qwen2-1.5B + LoRA on T4 GPU.
